ddt:Target.Name: X10-X98-X87-X52ClimBoxGen1_v08_3
ddt:Target.Description:
X10-X98 ClimBox Gen1 ========== Database done by R. Mérat +33 1 76 83 26 45
v01 : -- first release issue from L43-L47 database
v02 : C4 -- Update for SLOT -- New screen for X10 & X98 -- Screen by function -- Update Config CompValveType X98 -- Delete Config WithCompValve and WithCompClutch
v03 : C5 --Add value 900w and 1500w for CL_PTCType --Add Climloop mode data on screen : Battery Conditionning Mode X10 --Screen HPMLoopManagement : Replace OLB_HPM_RightMixActrPosition by IH_RecyActrPosition
v04 : C6 --Correction of CompValveRequest failures detection --Consideration of X87 and X52 in screens --Add RightSolarlevel for X98 --Add GAD in each "State" screens --Update for AQS unit --Add AQS sreen for X98 & X87 --Add Climate Mode for X52 --Update Auto-identification --T4 = X98 & X87 & X52
v04_1: C6 --IO control Fragrance Actuator.mode = Perfume 1 or Home
v04_2 : C6 : -- Add officialization date -- Correction of ODX error (tester present with response)
v04_3 : C6 : -- Update "Logiciel" for Auto-identification -- Update screen "Trame BCM X10"
v05_1 : C7 : L. PREVOT -- Update "Logiciel" for Auto-identification -- Update screen T4 "AQS State Data X98 & X87" for MFD informations -- Add somes informations on T4 "Climate Mode X98 & X87" and T4 "Climate Mode X52" --Correction Screen "Control Panel/ECU ID" --Correction of ILB_FP_SpareCPPartNumber : Ascii --Correction Screen ControlPanel/ControlPanel X10 and T4 information pushclearness
v06_1 : C8 : A.LELAURIN --Add CL_MMIArchitecture for S10 --Update "Logiciel" for Auto-identification
v07_1 : Dx : A.LELAURIN --Add IH_HVPTCConsumption --Add IH_StopAutoForClim (for X98 Not used in C7) --Add IH_VehicleStateForClim --Add OH_BatteryBlowerState --Changing range of HotSource --Update "Logiciel" for Auto-identification --Update screen "PTC Cabin & Battery Mode X10" --Add frame $2152 with internal parameters --Add comment for screen "Preconditionning Mode X10" --Add IH_WiperState --Add comment "Version 2 EVs" for 5Agen3
=> Prévoir Update "Logiciel" for Auto-identification pour les C9
v08_1 : Dx : C.DUVAL DDT base updated, resources from DED activated: 2143 - DataRead.CanData1 - IH_ElectricalPowerDrived; 2144 - DataRead.CanData2 - OH_ClimLoopMode.
v08_2 :Dx:C.BUTA -- Correction of "ApprovalNumber.BasicPartList"
v08_3: Dx: M. DUMITRU -- Addition of project X98 PH 2

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by True Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by True Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by True Page to decode data)

Item.Text: APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) - PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
request for opening valve during xx secondes
request for closing valve during xx secondes
Major compressor default or automatic recovery
De-ice vehicle state 1 request : battery loading
De-ice vehicle state3 request: high speed driving
De-ice vehicle state4 request: idle state driving
De-ice vehicle state 5 request : low battery SOC
request for opening valve during xx secondes
request for closing valve during xx secondes

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: FailuresDetect.All
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import (Conditional)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Status
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Label.Text: Vehicle Manufacturer Kit Assembly Part Number

Screen.Name: LIN Data X10 Climbox to PACBOX

Label.Text: CC- : Command PWM or Diag Feedback
CC+ : Command PWM or Diag Feedback
Discharge Temperature Sensor 1 send to CAN
De-ice vehicle request Climbox to Pacbox
Climbox request to EVC for activate HVPTC
Climbox send to EVC request PWM for HVPTC
Voir écran EVC pour donner LIN PTC HV
EVC send to Climbox HVPTC Consumption
Stop by customer or other request
AC Cooling Fan Speed Status from ECM
AC Min Engine Idle Speed Request
AC Comp Clutch Status from ECM
AC Comp Clutch Status from ECM
Stop by customer or other request
